ancestorTitles: when worktree directory does not exist
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree directory does not exist returns status=skipped and skips rmSync
assertionResults.title: returns status=skipped and skips rmSync

ancestorTitles: when worktree directory does not exist
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree directory does not exist still deletes a stale branch when the directory is already gone
assertionResults.title: still deletes a stale branch when the directory is already gone

ancestorTitles: when worktree directory does not exist
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree directory does not exist marks branchDeleted=true even when there is no branch to delete
assertionResults.title: marks branchDeleted=true even when there is no branch to delete

ancestorTitles: when worktree exists and is clean
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree exists and is clean returns status=pruned after successful removal
assertionResults.title: returns status=pruned after successful removal

ancestorTitles: when worktree exists and is clean
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree exists and is clean deletes the branch when it has 0 commits ahead of HEAD
assertionResults.title: deletes the branch when it has 0 commits ahead of HEAD

ancestorTitles: when worktree exists and is clean
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree exists and is clean leaves the branch when it has commits ahead of HEAD
assertionResults.title: leaves the branch when it has commits ahead of HEAD

ancestorTitles: when worktree exists and is clean
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree exists and is clean falls back to rmSync when git worktree remove fails
assertionResults.title: falls back to rmSync when git worktree remove fails

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree is dirty marks wasDirty=true
assertionResults.title: marks wasDirty=true

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree is dirty writes an audit log entry when dirty
assertionResults.title: writes an audit log entry when dirty

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree is dirty does NOT write an audit log entry when clean
assertionResults.title: does NOT write an audit log entry when clean

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree error handling returns status=error when the directory is not a git repo
assertionResults.title: returns status=error when the directory is not a git repo

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree error handling returns status=error when both git remove and rmSync fail
assertionResults.title: returns status=error when both git remove and rmSync fail
